preview_text:
The model favors Ivory Coast at 64%, a substantial advantage over Curaçao's 12%. The underdog faces a steep climb, with the model assigning a roughly one-in-nine chance of victory on a neutral surface.

The forecast leans decisively toward an Ivory Coast win, but the 25% draw probability indicates meaningful competitive balance in the middle outcome. The gap between favorite and underdog is wide enough to make Curaçao a genuine longshot, yet the draw sits between the two outright outcomes, suggesting the match could remain contested into the final stages rather than becoming a runaway affair.

The sportsbook consensus and Polymarket prices both shift the forecast in Ivory Coast's direction, tilting the favorite to 83% while compressing Curaçao to around 5%. The divergence is material—roughly 19 percentage points on the Ivory Coast line—with bookmakers and traders viewing the underdog as substantially weaker than the model does. The model does not adjudicate between these sources; the dashboard presents both for context.
